title: herniaria arenaria var. hirsuta
intro: Herniaria arenaria var. hirsuta, also known as hairy sweet grass, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) and is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of H. arenaria var. hirsuta include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and act as a natural diuretic. It can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, coughs, and skin conditions.
